det⁡(1−λ322−λ)=(1−λ)(2−λ)−6=0  ⟺  λ2−3λ+2−6=0  ⟺  λ2−3λ−4=0  ⟺  (λ+1)(λ−4)=0∴λ=−1,4\det \begin{pmatrix} 1- \lambda & 3\\ 2 & 2 - \lambda \end{pmatrix} = (1- \lambda) (2 - \lambda) - 6 = 0\\ \iff \lambda^2 - 3\lambda + 2 - 6 = 0\\ \iff \lambda^2 - 3\lambda - 4 = 0\\ \iff (\lambda + 1) (\lambda - 4) = 0\\ \therefore \lambda = -1, 4det(1−λ2​32−λ​)=(1−λ)(2−λ)−6=0⟺λ2−3λ+2−6=0⟺λ2−3λ−4=0⟺(λ+1)(λ−4)=0∴λ=−1,4

import sympy as sp
A = sp.Matrix([
    [1, 3],
    [2, 2]
])
P = sp.Matrix([
    [-3/2, 1],
    [1, 1]
])

P.inv() @ A @ P

import sympy as sp
A = sp.Matrix([
    [1, 3],
    [2, 2]
])
print("λ=", A.eigenvals().keys())
print("x=", A.eigenvects())

import sympy as sp
A = sp.Matrix([
    [1, 0],
    [0, 1],
])

P = A

P.inv() @ A @ P
